print_identifier: value of solr isbn or issn.  Where multiple values, select only first value
date_first_issue_online: When we have year values, in the 974$y, especially for serials and MPMs, are we able to identify the earliest of those values? If so, use that value; if not, use solr display_date
date_last_issue_online: Similar to date_first, if we are able to identify the most recent year value, use that. If not, leave blank
title_url: Use the solr value of id, stripped of leading 0s, to create a link to the title level record.
title_id: use solr field id, stripped of leading '0's
oclc_number: first value present in solr field oclc

publication_title: Heir to empire: United States economic diplomacy, 1916-1923 [by] Carl P. Parrini
